title: allium sandrasicum
intro: Allium sandrasicum, also known as Sandrasi garlic, is a species of plant in the Allium genus that is native to Turkey and the Middle East. This plant is a type of wild garlic that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Allium sandrasicum include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Allium sandrasicum can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
